huṃ—√kṛ P. -karoti (ind.p. -kṛtya), to utter the sound hum, to hum,  ŚārṅgP. ;
to address roughly,  Yājñ. ;
to utter a sound of disgust at (acc.),  Car.  :
Caus. -kārayati, to give vent to one's anger,  MBh.
